sourcesContent:
/**
 * Carousel image list — tambahkan nama file gambar kamu di sini.
 * File harus ada di folder: public/assets/
 *
 * Contoh:
 *   'banner1.jpg',
 *   'promo-ramadan.png',
 *   'menu-lebaran.webp',
 */
const carouselImages = [
    "Thumbnail_Student Facilities-01.jpg",
    "pembelajaran-praktik-langsung-di-dunia-kerja-khas-pradita-university__FTdMz.jpg",
    "program-studi-culinary-arts-pradita-university-borong-pulang-medali-di-the-5th-la-cuisine-2023__jNuDb.jpg"
];

export default carouselImages;
